normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem alignment_length (denoms : Denoms) (amount : Nat) : (coinChangeCanonical denoms amount).length = denoms.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The returned counts vector has the same length as the denominations.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem decomposition_correct (denoms : Denoms) (amount : Nat) : Decomposes denoms (coinChangeCanonical denoms amount) amount
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The returned counts decompose the target amount using the weighted sum.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem nonnegativity_counts (denoms : Denoms) (amount : Nat) : ∀ i : Fin (coinChangeCanonical denoms amount).length, 0 ≤ (coinChangeCanonical denoms amount).get i := by intro i; exact Nat.zero_le _

theorem optimality_min_sum (denoms : Denoms) (amount : Nat) (hcan : Canonical denoms) :
  ∀ counts : Counts, Decomposes denoms counts amount → (coinChangeCanonical denoms amount).sum ≤ counts.sum
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Among all valid decompositions, the returned counts have minimal total number of coins.
